questions.scenario: A pull request says `add invoice exports`, but the plan summary says `2 to add, 0 to change, 1 to destroy`. What should happen next?

options.text: Ignore the summary and merge faster.

questions.explanation: The destroy may be valid, but it must be explained before the real system changes.

questions.scenario: Which plan detail is usually highest risk?

options.text: A no-op where no change was expected.

questions.explanation: Replacement destroys and recreates an object, so it deserves careful review.

questions.scenario: What should reviewers compare when reading a plan?

options.text: The exact resources and fields in the plan.
Only whether the CI job was green.

questions.explanation: A green job does not replace reading whether the proposed real-world change matches the intent.
